title: OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER - 211info
text: SIUSLAW OUTREACH SERVICES OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers limited motel vouchers when temperatures reach 38 degrees with wind and rain OR 32 degrees or below. Eligibility: Families with minors and individuals with mobility issues Hours: Phone: Monday-Thursday 10am-3:30pm, Friday 9am-4pm when temperatures reach 38 degrees with wind and rain OR 32 degrees or below (541) 997-2816 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 997-2816 Alternate (541) 997-4444 after hours INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: City of Florence Services: Homeless Motel Vouchers * Disabilities Issues Homeless Motel Vouchers * Homeless Families If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
